final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: social media carousel grid, 3x3 layout for Xiaohongshu (小红书)
Primary request: a 3:4 vertical 9-grid poster designed for clean slicing into 9 individual posts, featuring 8 sleep tips with cohesive cream-toned aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: soft cream white and oat milk gradient background with subtle texture, each cell has gentle rounded corners and visible grid spacing
Subject: 9-panel infographic about sleep hygiene tips, each panel with large Chinese typography, soft illustrations of pillows, moon, stars, warm milk, candles, books, eye masks, curtains, beds
Style/medium: editorial graphic design, soft 3D clay-style illustrations, minimal flat design with light skeuomorphic touches, magazine-quality layout
Composition/framing: 3 columns × 3 rows grid layout with clear borders between cells, each cell self-contained and centered, generous whitespace, no text near cut lines
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm lighting, cozy bedtime atmosphere, calming and therapeutic mood
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oat, soft caramel as primary; dark brown for text; muted warm accents
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, soft fabric textures for bedding elements, smooth ceramic for cups
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: must be exactly 3x3 grid with clear separations for easy slicing, all text in Chinese only, each cell must work as standalone image, consistent visual style across all 9 panels
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetics, excessive decorations, text overlapping grid lines, cluttered layout, English text, deformed characters
